title: Schengen area short-stay limit — 90 days in any 180
notes: For visa-free visitors: at most 90 days of presence within any rolling 180-day window, counting any part-day as a day. Member list as of 2026 (Bulgaria and Romania included; Cyprus not yet a full member). Microstates (Monaco, San Marino, Vatican, Andorra) are de facto accessible but not modeled. Does not apply to EU citizens or residence-permit holders.
